title: rubus densipilus
intro: Rubus densipilus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan bramble, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family, Rosaceae. It is native to the Himalayan region and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Rubus densipilus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. Rubus densipilus can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in traditional medicine in the form of jams, jellies, and other preparations.
